title: 2048 Drop Merge
description: 2048 Drop Merge is a puzzle game that challenges players to strategically drop and merge numbered tiles to reach the elusive 2048 tile. As players progress, they must carefully plan their moves to create larger and larger tiles. With its simple yet addictive gameplay, 2048 Drop Merge is a must-play for fans of puzzle games looking for a fun and challenging experience. Have fun!
instructions: Drag and release to shoot numbers
